summary: Mediocre recording of a lackluster show; Dark Star falls flat despite a funny onstage moment.
review: The reviewer notes a humorous stage banter but criticizes the band for sounding unfocused and calls this one of the most boring Dark Stars ever. No specific audio quality details are given, leaving the recording’s technical merit unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single review with mixed comments; performance is judged poor while no recording quality info is provided, resulting in a low‑mid overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing; overall impression is that the performance was dull.
